description: The `microsoft.dynamics365.finance.asset` connector provides APIs for fixed assets, bank management, cash management, project accounting, and expense management in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance. It covers asset books, bank accounts, bank transactions, project categories, and expense policies.
key-features: Fixed asset CRUD and asset value model management
Bank account, bank group, and bank transaction management
Asset lending and leasing group configuration
Project accounting categories and cost price configuration
Expense reports, per-diem policies, and travel categories
